name: Network International
description: Network International — UAE-based payment processor and acquirer serving MENA with card processing, POS, and e-commerce solutions.

seo.title: Network International — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Network International: Network International — UAE-based payment processor and acquirer serving MENA with card processing, POS, and e-commerce solutions.

when_to_use: Card processing for UAE and GCC e-commerce merchants
POS acquiring for retail chains across MENA
3DS2 authentication for cross-border card transactions in ME
Dynamic currency conversion for tourist-facing merchants

pros: Major MENA acquirer with bank relationships
POS and e-commerce under one roof
review.verdict: MENA incumbent acquirer — pick it for enterprise scale and direct acquiring, not for quick developer onboarding.
review.best_for: Enterprises and large merchants needing MENA card processing and acquiring
review.not_for: Startups wanting fast self-serve payment integration

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
